rulings.Case Title: MARILYN GRAY et al VS. DAVID FONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Wilson Pan'S Michelle An'S And Century 21 Realty Alliance'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 2, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT MICHELLE AN, CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE, GUANGQING PAN Notice Of Defendants Wilson Pan'S Michelle An'S And Century 21 Realty Alliance'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Moving party met Tech-Billt factors. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 2, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC (ERRONEOUSLY SUED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to April 4, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than March 11, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And To Stay Case Pending Pltf'S Response To Discovery Requests
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 2, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ABDO BADANI Defendants Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And To Stay Case Pending Pltf'S Response To Discovery Requests DENIED. Discovery at issue is not propounded by a party to the action. Counsel did not properly substitute in for Abdo Badani. Also, Abdo's answer was stricken on July 10, 2015. Almakdad Badani never appeared in this action. = (501/REQ)
